case_title: PARADA-VIALE, JOAQUIN VS CASTRO, ROSA GENERAL MAGAGER et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARADA-VIALE, JOAQUIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, ROSA  GENERAL MAGAGER TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES $1,328.75 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,354.75, ROSA CASTROL IS AMENDED TO: TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAILING TO GRUPO TACA RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,328.75 FILED BY PARADA-VIALE, JOAQUIN AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, ROSA  GENERAL MAGAGER TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
